title: strobilopsis wrightii
intro: Strobilopsis wrightii, also known as the "Monkey's Head Mushroom", is a type of fungus that belongs to the family of Ascomycota. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Strobilopsis wrightii include its potential to treat various infections, including herpes and tuberculosis, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. In traditional herbal preparations, it is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
